name: Workspace New Tab
description: A macOS and iPadOS inspired browser workspace for Chrome's new tab page.

content_security_policy.extension_pages: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; img-src 'self' https: data:; media-src 'self' https://cdn.pixabay.com; frame-src https://www.youtube-nocookie.com https://www.youtube.com https://open.spotify.com; connect-src 'self' https:
